sql_query.query: SELECT TRUE AS updated FROM users u JOIN organizations o ON o.id = u.organization_id AND o.active = TRUE WHERE u.id = $1 AND u.organization_id = $2 AND u.active = TRUE

WITH incoming AS (SELECT $1::text AS event_name, $2::text AS provider_reference, $3::text AS provider_event_id, left(COALESCE($4::text, ''), 1000) AS provider_message), updated_payout AS (UPDATE payouts p SET status = CASE WHEN i.event_name = 'transfer.success' THEN 'paid' ELSE 'failed' END, provider_event_id = NULLIF(i.provider_event_id, ''), failure_message = CASE WHEN i.event_name = 'transfer.success' THEN NULL ELSE NULLIF(i.provider_message, '') END, paid_at = CASE WHEN i.event_name = 'transfer.success' THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE NULL END, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM incoming i WHERE p.provider_reference = i.provider_reference AND p.provider = 'paystack-test' AND p.status IN ('queued', 'processing') AND i.event_name IN ('transfer.success', 'transfer.failed', 'transfer.reversed') AND length(i.provider_reference) BETWEEN 8 AND 160 RETURNING p.*), updated_submission AS (UPDATE submissions s SET status = p.status, current_step_id = CASE WHEN p.status = 'paid' THEN COALESCE((SELECT ws.id FROM milestones m JOIN workflow_steps ws ON ws.cohort_id = m.cohort_id AND ws.organization_id = m.organization_id WHERE m.id = s.milestone_id AND m.organization_id = s.organization_id AND ws.active = TRUE AND ws.step_type = 'receipt' AND ws.role = 'system' ORDER BY ws.position LIMIT 1), s.current_step_id) ELSE s.current_step_id END, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM updated_payout p WHERE s.id = p.submission_id AND s.organization_id = p.organization_id AND s.status IN ('processing', 'awaiting_finance') RETURNING s.id, s.organization_id), audited AS (INSERT INTO audit_events (organization_id, submission_id, actor_id, actor_name, actor_role, event_type, event_key, title, detail, metadata, created_at) SELECT p.organization_id, p.submission_id, NULL, 'Paystack test', 'provider', CASE WHEN p.status = 'paid' THEN 'payout_paid' ELSE 'payout_failed' END, concat('paystack:', COALESCE(p.provider_event_id, 'none'), ':', p.provider_reference), CASE WHEN p.status = 'paid' THEN 'Test payout confirmed' ELSE 'Test payout failed' END, CASE WHEN p.status = 'paid' THEN concat('Signed webhook confirmed ', p.currency, ' ', p.amount::text, ' as paid.') ELSE COALESCE(p.failure_message, 'Paystack reported that the test transfer failed.') END, jsonb_build_object('providerReference', p.provider_reference, 'providerEventId', COALESCE(p.provider_event_id, ''), 'status', p.status), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM updated_payout p JOIN updated_submission s ON s.id = p.submission_id AND s.organization_id = p.organization_id RETURNING id) SELECT p.id, p.organization_id AS "organizationId", p.submission_id AS "submissionId", p.learner_id AS "learnerId", p.provider_reference AS "providerReference", p.status, p.paid_at::text AS "paidAt" FROM updated_payout p JOIN updated_submission s ON s.id = p.submission_id AND s.organization_id = p.organization_id JOIN audited a ON TRUE
